reviews.comment:
En esta estación de servicio destaco la limpieza de los baños.

(Translated by Google)
At this service station I highlight the cleanliness of the bathrooms.

reviews.comment:
Hermoso balneario y recreo
Para pasar una muy grata jornada. Agreste muy limpio
Nadie deja basura
Con fogones

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful resort and recreation area
Perfect for a very pleasant day out. Rustic and very clean
No one leaves trash
With fire pits
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjbU1EUTd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente opción para pasar la noche en viaje.  Muy buena tarifa para socios del ACA con desayuno incluido. Las camas son enormes y nuevas. El personal súper atento. Recomiendo!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent option for an overnight stay while traveling. Great rate for ACA members with breakfast included. The beds are huge and new. The staff is incredibly attentive. Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjOEtMaF9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente Parador en la ruta. Ordenado, limpio, muy bien atendido por los chicos del Full fe la estación. Volveremos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent rest stop on the route. Organized, clean, and very well attended by the guys from Full de la Estación. We'll be back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzaGNmQjNRRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place. Good service and delicious coffee.

reviews.comment:
Caro como todas las YPF de la ruta, pero buen servicio. La nafta, eso si, mas barata por estar debajo del paralelo 42

(Translated by Google)
Expensive, like all the YPF stations on the route, but good service. Gasoline, however, is cheaper because it's located below the 42nd parallel.
